allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('name:', p.name, 'version:', p.version\)")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT name, category, unit FROM dict_items WHERE name LIKE '%ДТ%' OR name LIKE '%дт%';")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT name, category, unit FROM expenses WHERE name LIKE '%ДТ%' LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT DISTINCT unit FROM expenses WHERE name = 'ДТ';")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT id, date, name, category, unit FROM expenses WHERE name = 'ДТ' AND unit = 'шт' LIMIT 10;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "UPDATE expenses SET unit = 'л' WHERE name = 'ДТ' AND unit = 'шт'; SELECT changes\(\) as updated;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT id, name, client_name, client_org_id FROM projects;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT id, name FROM organizations WHERE name LIKE '%АйхалЦентр%';")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT id, name, client_name, client_org_id FROM projects WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT id, name FROM organizations ORDER BY name;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "UPDATE projects SET client_org_id=1 WHERE id=1; UPDATE projects SET client_org_id=2 WHERE id=2;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT id, name FROM projects;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT id, name, client_name FROM projects;")
Bash(sqlite3 trucks.db "SELECT SUM\(amount\) FROM trips WHERE project_id=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL;")
